question.label: Self-read opener
question.name: Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?
question.description: Anchors the conversation in their self-assessment first; gap vs manager's view becomes a signal.

answer: I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.

assessment.note: She gave a clear self-read and named uneven influence as the weakness, which signals mild engagement drag around stakeholder-facing work.

new_queue.label: Uneven influence
new_queue.name: When you say 'influence is uneven', where has that shown up most clearly?

new_queue.label: Impact evidence
new_queue.name: What was the clearest business outcome from your work this quarter?

new_queue.label: Stakeholder signal
new_queue.name: Where did your work need stakeholder buy-in this quarter?

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?

new_queue.label: Senior bar
new_queue.name: What does good look like at Senior level in your view?

new_queue.label: Signal choices
new_queue.name: What do you choose to make visible before the work is done?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What is the first concrete thing you want to move by our next conversation?

history.answer_excerpt: I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.
I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.
